payload.answer: SQL access is disabled in this environment (BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false), so the query cannot be executed.
citations: /brain admin sql SELECT * FROM memory_cards with BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false

entity_resolution.reason: No durable memory update is appropriate because the request is an administrative SQL query while BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false.

details: Blocked admin SQL request because debug SQL is disabled.

repair_options: Enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED to allow admin SQL queries.
Use a supported non-SQL memory action instead.
